title: Buttery Crispy Thai Rice Pilaf
description: A cozy Thai dish featuring buttery rice cooked with vinegar and crispy bits for a raw-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Coriander (cilantro) leaves
ingredients.notes: fresh or fresh frozen can be used

instructions: Rinse the rice in cold water and drain. Soak it in hot water for at least 30 minutes.
In a large saucepan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic, cumin seeds, chili flakes, and salt. Stir until fragrant.
Drain the soaked rice well and add to the pan with water, fish sauce, Thai vinegar, and half of the chopped coriander leaves. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 15 minutes or until all the water is absorbed.
Remove from heat and let it rest covered for 5 minutes. Fluff with a fork and stir in remaining chopped coriander.
Garnish with extra butter and chopped coriander before serving.
